name: divorce-navigator
description: Navigate a difficult life transition with clarity. Build a checklist of what needs to happen, restructure your budget for single income, plan your days, face your fears honestly, and draft necessary communications. No judgement, just structure.

config.instruction: Build a comprehensive divorce/separation checklist: legal steps (lawyer, filing, custody), financial steps (accounts, assets, debts), housing, insurance, employment changes, children's needs, timeline.

Restructure finances for single income. Account for: legal costs, new housing, child support/alimony (paying or receiving), insurance changes, emergency fund rebuild. Produce a 6-month transition budget.
Build a daily routine that provides stability during upheaval. Include: self-care, work, children's schedule, legal tasks, social support, exercise, and one small thing that's just for you.

Honestly inventory the fears: financial, loneliness, children's wellbeing, social judgment, starting over, the unknown. For each fear, identify what's in your control and what's not. Name them to tame them.

Draft the necessary communications: to employer (schedule changes), to children's school, to shared service providers, to mutual friends (boundary-setting), and a template for difficult conversations with your ex. Professional, boundaried, clear.
